business_angle: A.M.T Roofing Penarth - customers praise tidy finishes and quality workmanship in Penarth, CF64
distinctive_phrases: These guys have done a fantastic job on our roof
They had patience and communicated clearly with us when giving our quote (very competitive by the way)
If I could add more stars I would
Completely professional from start to finish
Also replaced all my guttering / fascia / down pipes to a great standard

strongest_review_quote.text:
These guys have done a fantastic job on our roof. They had patience and communicated clearly with us when giving our quote (very competitive by the way). They also were very timely and did a darn good job of getting this roof on. They were very respectful to my family and they cleaned up after themselves exceptionally well.  They pointed out little things along the way that they went ahead and fixed while up there which really saved us both time and money later on.

I know we wont have to worry
strongest_review_quote.author: Hunter

best_photos_rationale: Google Places photos preferred for gallery when high quality
claims_to_avoid: Supplier names as job locations in captions
